                         search channels (9 registered)
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ name             ┃ weight ┃ active ┃ description                             ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ fuzzy            │ 0.2680 │ 0.2680 │ Graded jamo trigram overlap (>=0.4) +   │
│                  │        │        │ SequenceMatcher fallback (>=0.55) on    │
│                  │        │        │ note.id and aliases                     │
│ keyword          │ 0.1000 │ 0.0550 │ Token AND match against note id + body, │
│                  │        │        │ score = matched/total tokens            │
│ filename         │ 0.2000 │ 0.0000 │ Exact / case-insensitive / substring /  │
│                  │        │        │ no-space match on note.id               │
│ sequence_match   │ 0.0780 │ 0.0780 │ All query tokens (in any order) appear  │
│                  │        │        │ in normalized note.id, score 1.0        │
│ filename_partial │ 0.1500 │ 0.1500 │ Partial token match on normalized       │
│                  │        │        │ note.id, score = matched / total        │
│ body_match       │ 0.3630 │ 0.3630 │ BM25 over jamo trigrams of (note.id +   │
│                  │        │        │ body), max-normalized to [0,1]          │
│ child_body_match │ 0.1690 │ 0.1690 │ Index/root inherits the max raw BM25    │
│                  │        │        │ score across notes that ref it          │
│ related          │ 0.0320 │ 0.0320 │ Graph-neighbor expansion (common refs / │
│                  │        │        │ tags / wikilink edges) from             │
│                  │        │        │ filename-matched seeds, max-normalized  │
│ project          │ 0.0330 │ 0.0330 │ Note lives in mapping.project_dir or    │
│                  │        │        │ refs into one — score 1.0               │
└──────────────────┴────────┴────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────┘
